name: client-surface-hunt
description: Caça generalista a falhas client-side: XSS sinks, postMessage, prototype pollution, JSONP, WebSocket, Service Worker, storage, SRI, CSRF forms, CSP fraca, source maps, OIDC, CORS, headers, open redirect (verify).
targetHint: qualquer SPA, PWA ou site com JS bundles públicos

limits.notes: client_surface_audit é estático + source maps. dom_xss_verify gera plano Playwright. verify.js testa reflected XSS e open redirect. cors_audit cobre misconfig CORS ativa.
